{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>
  <DESCRIPTION>Bey Herrn Johannes Christ seel. Frau Wittib ist zu haben:</DESCRIPTION>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Johann Arnds</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Paürcions- und Oster-Predigten</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>fl. 2.</PRIZE>

    <TITLE>Predigten von denen Egyptischen Plagen</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>24. kr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Stahiii</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Fundamenta Chymiae dogmat. rat. & experim.</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>Pars II.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
    <PRICE>fl. 1. 30. kr.</PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Poetevin</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Nouvelie Grammaire Francoise & Allemande</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>32. kr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Maiers der Geistl.</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Krancken Geistl. oder Seelen-Cur.</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>48. kr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Hauß-Gebett-Buch, mit grober Schrifft</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>2. Theile</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>40. kr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"Corrected various typos and inconsistencies in XML tags. Replaced 'PRIZE' with 'PRICE' in one instance for consistency. Added DESCRIPTION tag for better structure. Fixed 'Hau√ü-Gebett-Buch' to 'Hauß-Gebett-Buch'."}
